newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent events (May AGM with dividend hike to EUR0.80 and new CFO, and a late-May medium-term target / 2026 guidance update with order-intake forecast adjustment) all predate June 9 and were in the prior case.

sources.label: Dürr AG updates guidance after solid start to 2026 (ad-hoc-news)
Dürr AG AGM backs higher dividend and new CFO (ad-hoc-news)

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent screen: factory automation / environmental / surface-processing could support reshored hardware production - thesis intact. No new news since June 9 (AGM and late-May guidance update already priced). Continued -18% YTD drawdown marginally improves asymmetry but is a price effect, not fundamental, so hold per the screen's rules.
verdicts.bull: Automation, environmental and surface-processing tech are picks-and-shovels for reshored component/hardware manufacturing.
verdicts.neutral: Deep auto-paint-shop exposure makes the AI-reshoring tie indirect; backlog solid but end-demand macro-sensitive.
verdicts.bear: -18% YTD on weak auto/European capex; order-intake forecast trimmed and restructuring underway signal soft demand.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Weak automotive/European capex cycle and order-intake softness
